summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Japanese language toggle functionality. All core language features working correctly on localhost, but public URL routing issue discovered.

routing_issues.issue: Public URL (https://demobackend.emergentagent.com) returns 'Route not found' error instead of serving frontend
routing_issues.impact: Users cannot access the application via public URL
routing_issues.details: Frontend works correctly on localhost:3000 but public URL appears to be misconfigured to point to backend instead of frontend

passed_tests: Language toggle flags appear on landing page navigation
Language toggle flags appear on login page navigation
Language toggle flags appear on apply page navigation
Japanese flag successfully changes content to Japanese (TOP WAR → トップウォー)
British flag successfully changes content back to English
Login form labels translate correctly (Username/Password ↔ ユーザー名/パスワード)
Language context and translation hooks working properly
All navigation components include LanguageToggle component
Comprehensive Japanese translations available for all UI elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix public URL routing configuration. The public URL (https://demobackend.emergentagent.com) is currently returning backend 'Route not found' errors instead of serving the React frontend. Frontend works perfectly on localhost:3000. This appears to be a deployment/infrastructure issue where the public URL is misconfigured to point to the backend instead of the frontend.
